# CWE-15 negative: configuration not taken from untrusted request (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-15-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// CWE-15 External Control of System or Configuration Setting (mitigated)
func ConfigureDatabase(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	dsn := os.Getenv("APP_DATABASE_URL")
	if dsn == "" {
		http.Error(w, "database", http.StatusServiceUnavailable)
		return
	}
	db, err := sql.Open("postgres", dsn)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "database", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	defer db.Close()
	if err := db.Ping(); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "database", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
